final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input [2:0] shift_amount,
    input shift_left,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (shift_left)
        data_out <= data_in << shift_amount;
    else
        data_out <= data_in >> shift_amount;
    end
    
endmodule
